subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-02-08
subcodes.first_line: The Word of glory and deliverance was sent down upon the children of Israel at a time when all of them had sunk to such depths of abasement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کلمه عزت و نجات بنی اسرائیل وقتی نازل شد که جمیع انها در ذلت بودند بدرجه
